contentList.content: The cracked core has now been replaced, and the staff is once again ready to function. Even though it is still not at its full potential, the staff has already become a very useful tool when battling the forces of darkness.

The staff has become more powerful, its wooden surface now rough with thick roots and bark that pulse with life. While still completely natural, the staff is now imbued with the primal forces of the world. It channels not just light, but the storm and earth as well, enabling its wielder to draw upon the elements for power.

This ancient staff has now fully awakened, its surface covered in intricate vines, thorns, and moss. It pulses with the raw, untamed magic of the world, drawing upon the very life force of the planet. The wood is impossibly strong, yet still alive, shifting and growing in the hand of its wielder. It is a conduit for the oldest magics, granting its bearer dominion over the elements and life itself.
As an action, the staff can emit bright, natural light in a [1] radius. This light dispels magical darkness blinds all enemies and damages them for [2]
Target that success a saving throw still takes half the damage
Conjure a flash of light that dispels magical darkness, blinds all enemies and damages them for [1]
Target that success a saving throw still takes half the damage
Conjure a flash of light that dispels magical darkness, blinds all enemies and damages them for [1]
A flash of light into the enemy eyes, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">blinding</LSTag> them, giving you a change to escape.
Upon successful <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>, the target is not <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">blinded</LSTag>

hf140e50bg68dag4893g84eeg84cc0566e0b7:2:Deal additional Radiant damage equal to your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag>. On a hit, light erupts around you in a [1] area. Enemies in the light must succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="DifficultyClass"> DC</LSTag> 13 Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag>.
A burst of pure light erupts from Your staff, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">blinding</LSTag> all enemies within a [1] radius.

Upon successful Saving Throw the target is still blinded for [1] turn.
This spell has +[2] to its DC
Shine Your staff as the ultimate beacon of hope, dispeling any magical darkness and <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">blinding</LSTag> all enemies in the [1] radius.

Upon successful Saving Throw the target is still blinded for [1] turn.
This spell has +[2] to its DC
You are considered <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficient</LSTag> with the Elven Blade.
Allows you to dualwield while holding the Elven Blade.

This weapon is infused with pure storm energy, causing arcs of lightning to dance across its surface. Each strike carries the essence of a raging tempest, dealing additional lightning damage and crackling with unrelenting power.
With a whispered incantation, the Elven Blade crackles faintly with energy, imbuing it with additional [1]. The power is raw, yet tamed enough to strike with precision.
A surge of thunderous might courses through the sword, enhancing it with [1]. Bolts of electricity ripple across the blade, ready to unleash the storm with every strike.

Calling the storm for aid, a lightning strikes the Elven Blade, binding with it. Each swing now delivers [1], crackling with relentless energy. The storm lives within the blade, turning every strike into a force of nature.

This exquisite toolkit is crafted with the precision and artistry of Elven masters. Each tool within the set is meticulously forged from the finest materials and enchanted with subtle elven runes to ensure flawless craftsmanship. The toolkit includes delicate hammers, intricate chisels, and other specialized instruments, all designed to enhance the crafting of weapons and artifacts. The Elven Artificer’s Crafting Set is not merely a collection of tools but a symbol of the Elven commitment to excellence and perfection in every creation.
The gelid texture of this substance is a reflection of the frost giants who tame equally icy salamanders at the intersection between the Planes of Air and Water.

Once a humble yet reliable walking staff, this aged wooden relic now bears the deep scars of time and wear. A jagged crack runs along its length, weakening its magic and causing it to falter in moments of need. The staff's power flickers unpredictably, offering only faint remnants of the strength it once held. Though it still serves as a basic tool for travel, its days of channeling true magic are long behind it, leaving its wielder with an unreliable and diminished instrument.

Gathered from the remnants of ancient arcane storms, Arcane Sparkdust is the fine ash left behind when powerful magical energies dissipate into the ether. Legends speak of mages who once harnessed the wild power of the arcane and how their magic, once spent, would settle into this ethereal dust. When used in crafting, it reignites the dormant power within the items it touches, breathing life into even the most mundane artifacts.

Piece of Elderwood is a branch from a rare and ancient tree believed to have grown in the presence of dragons. Its wood is dense with latent magical energy, soaking in the ambient power of the earth and the sky for centuries. When carefully harvested, Elderwood is said to channel nature’s most primal forces, making it the ideal base for magical staffs and wands.

A shard of pure light crystallized into solid form, the Lumencrystal Fragment is both rare and revered. Formed in the deepest caverns beneath ancient lands, it is said that these crystals are born from the radiant energy of the stars themselves. Each fragment holds a soft glow, even in the darkest places, and when incorporated into a staff, it imbues the weapon with otherworldly brilliance and light-based magic.

Aetheric Balm is a smooth, shimmering substance created by the alchemists of old from distilled moonlight and the essence of rare celestial herbs. It is often used to refine and repair powerful artifacts, granting them a renewed connection to the cosmic forces of the universe. When applied to a staff, the balm mends and enhances, allowing the weapon to channel the raw energy of the aether with unmatched precision.

Once the pride of elven smiths, this blade now bears the marks of time and wear. Its once-glimmering edge is chipped and dull, while the intricate runes along its surface have faded. Though forged with unparalleled skill, blades's true potential remains hidden beneath layers of tarnish.

The blade now feels as though it was freshly forged. Its polished surface gleams with elven artistry, reflecting the years of skill and dedication that went into its creation. Perfectly weighted and razor-sharp, this blade is a testament to the unparalleled expertise of its elven makers.

At the height of its form, this blade is a masterpiece of elven smithing. Every curve, every etching is a testament to the finest craftsmanship of an age long past. With a blade as sharp as starlight and a hilt perfectly shaped for a wielder’s hand, it is a sword without equal, revered as one of the finest weapons ever forged by elven hands.

The meticulous elven craftsmanship begins to reveal itself once more. The blade has been expertly restored, its edge keen again, and its balance unmatched. Though still not at its peak, the blade now cuts with the precision and elegance known only to weapons crafted by the finest elven hands.
Forged by the ancient Elven smiths, this ingot is renowned for its superior strength and resilience. It is essential in the crafting and enhancement of elven weaponry.

Carved from the finest elven minerals, this sharpening stone is revered for its ability to hone weapons to an exquisite edge. Its surface is smooth and infused with subtle elven runes, making it an indispensable tool for maintaining the edge of blades with elven precision.

This rare sharpening stone is imbued with the mystical properties of moonstone. It is said that its silvery glow reflects the light of the moon, and its refining capabilities are enhanced by its connection to lunar energies, perfect for sharpening weapons to a near-mystical sharpness.

Forged in the heart of thunderous storms, this crystal pulsates with the raw power of lightning. It is a rare and powerful material, channeling the fury of storms into any weapon it touches, enhancing its potency and adding a striking electrical edge.
Used to restore and enhance ancient elven weapons
Strengthened and improved, these robes now offer better protection and durability
Strengthened with sturdy fabric, this cape offers better protection and comfort during travels
Wearing this venerable hat instills an air of dignity and wisdom, naturally commanding respect

Earnest little Edith Cluckle was a small girl when she asked to be the great wizard Otiluke's apprentice. He scoffed at her, but was quickly abashed when Mystra herself endowed Edith with this very cloak.
Random <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">advantage</LSTag> or <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">disadvantage</LSTag> cuz u shit
An unstable flash of light, often faltering and failing to <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">blind</LSTag> due to the cracked staff’s flaws.
Casting any light-based spell from this staff causes a backlash of blinding light. The caster must succeed on a saving throw or become blinded by their own magic.

Channels the ancient and profound insights of the wizards. As one’s connection to this power deepens, it enhances their presence and understanding, reflecting the legendary wisdom and influence of ancient wizards.
Adds +[1] to Ingelligence and +[2] to Wisdom (Up to [3])
Glamdring deals +[1] more damage to monstrosities.

Forged in the ancient elven smithies, the Elven Blade was crafted from the finest Elvish steel, designed not only for power but also for elegance in battle. The elves, renowned for their agility and precision, shaped the blade to adapt to the wielder’s finesse. The exceptional properties of the Elvish steel allow the sword to be lightweight and perfectly balanced, making each strike swift and graceful, rather than reliant on pure strength.
Elven Blade scales with Dexterity instead of Strength. If wielded by a wizard, gransts a +[1] Dexterity bonus up to a [2] to the wielder.

Crafted by a master artisan of ancient times, this legendary ring is known as the Ring of Fire. Its crimson gem radiates a subtle warmth and quiet courage, sparking hope in the hearts of those who witness its glow. The ring's true power lies in its ability to inspire resilience and resolve, making its bearer a symbol of strength against despair. Concealed from the eyes of dark forces, the ring’s flame endures, imbuing its wearer with fortitude, wisdom, and an unwavering spirit in the face of darkness.
You can no longer recieve any damage from fire

Wearer of this very powerfull magical artefact is completely <LSTag Tooltip="Immune">immune</LSTag> to fire damage and can not be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FRIGHTENED">frightened</LSTag>, <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="CHARMED">charmed</LSTag> or <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DOMINATE_PERSON">dominated</LSTag>
Make everyone around you in a [1] radius immune to <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FRIGHTENED">Frightened</LSTag> and gain [2] each turn.
Your senses are sharpened, granting you an acute awareness of your surroundings. (+[1] Perception)
Your insight extends to others, allowing you to notice details and speak with subtle persuasion. (+[1] Perception, +[2] Persuasion)
You perceive the natural world’s secrets, gaining insight into both people and nature. (+[1] Perception, +[2] Persuasion, +[3] Nature)
With clarity of sight and heart, you understand the hidden motives of people and the essence of the land. (+[1] Perception, +[2] Persuasion, +[3] Nature)

When you are about to be hit by an enemy, increase your <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> by [1]. You take no damage from <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_MagicMissile">Magic Missile</LSTag>.
Worn fabric used to patch up torn robes
Used to restore and enhance clothing

Crafted by the master weavers, this elegant pouch contains the finest tools for mending and enhancing garments. Made from supple Elven leather and adorned with delicate leaf patterns, the pouch is said to have been used by the artisans who crafted the finest wizard robes. Each needle and thread within is imbued with subtle magic, ensuring any garment repaired with this kit retains its strength and beauty for centuries. In the hands of a skilled weaver, the tools can even improve the wearer's protection, seamlessly blending elegance with utility.

Upon successful Saving Throw, the target is not blinded.
This spell has -[1] to its DC
Unleash a subtle telekinetic force to push a single enemy back [1]. The magical shove is strong enough to knock them <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">prone</LSTag>, leaving them vulnerable.

Channel a more concentrated telekinetic burst, focusing on one enemy. The enhanced force knocks them back [1] and sends them <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">prone</LSTag>, destabilizing their stance.

Call upon the power of the ancients to deliver a devastating telekinetic strike to a single enemy. The force is overwhelming, hurling them back [1] and knocking them <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">prone</LSTag> with ancient might.
Threads of silver wind through the grain of this oak staff.
Upon successful <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>, the targets still recieves half of the damage, but is not knocked back or <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">proned</LSTag>
The wearer's presence is bolstered by the hat’s long-held association with wisdom, allowing them to speak with authority
Donning the hat evokes trust and respect, giving the wearer an edge in negotiation and subtle deception
This venerable hat lends an aura of wisdom and respect, making the wearer seem trustworthy and wise in all interactions
These robes bear the scars of the Nautiloid crash, worn and tattered
Carefully mended with patches, these robes are functional once again
Fully repaired, these robes have been restored to their former state
Stronger material used to fully restore the robes
Fine, magical thread used to enhance and reinforce the robes
A weathered cape showing signs of wear and tear, reflecting the trials of its journey
Mended with care, this cape is functional again, bearing the marks of past adventures
Carefully upgraded, this cape now offers greater protection and magical resilience

This modest, weathered backpack was slung over your shoulder when fate took an unexpected turn. As you traveled, unaware of the looming threat, you were abducted through a portal and onto a Nautiloid. Though much of what you packed remains, some of its contents are mysteriously missing, lost during the chaotic journey to Faerûn. Now, only the essentials remain—tools and provisions for a journey disrupted beyond your control.
A brief note from an old friend, asking for a special delivery. It highlights the importance of protecting these relics during their journey.

Dear wise one,


I ask of you to deliver these rare and sacred elven tools to safety. They have been kept at our home for centuries, and their protection is now more important than ever.

There have been rumors regarding some dark forces in the air and I trust only you to ensure their safety, for the road is long and fraught with peril.


- Your old friend
<LSTag Type="Image" Info="SoftWarning"/> Doing this with a cracked staff is most likely a suicide
Able to cast flame of anor
This Item can be repaired/upgraded up to a Legendary level

A weak and unstable version of the spell. The staff is cracked, and the magic backfires unpredictably. The spell releases a faint burst of energy, pushing back enemies [1] and knocking them <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">prone</LSTag>. You must succeed on a Constitution saving throw, or suffer half of the damage and be knocked prone.
You must wield Glamdring in order to use this spel!
You must wield the Elven Blade in order to use this spel!
A subtle aura of menace surrounds you. Gain +[1] to Intimidation checks, and you have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">advantage</LSTag> on all Intimidation <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">checks</LSTag>.
A subtle aura of menace surrounds you. Gain +[1] to Intimidation checks, and you have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">advantage</LSTag> on all Intimidation <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">checks</LSTag>.
Your presence commands greater fear. Gain +[1] to Intimidation checks.
Your very presence sends shivers down spines. Gain +[1] to Intimidation checks.
A subtle aura of menace surrounds you. Gain +[1] to Intimidation checks.
Target still takes half the damage and is pushed back, but does not become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">proned</LSTag>.
The Flame of Anor begins to hold its power steadily. The spell pushes back enemies [1]. Though still modest in power, it can now repel foes more effectively.
This spell unleashes a massive wave of thunderous force, pushing back [1] all enemies in its path. Few can withstand its power.

The unstable magic within the staff surges wildly when cast, making the wielder vulnerable to its chaotic energy. Each spell cast risks backlash, requiring you to succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">saving throw</LSTag> against your own spell DC to resist the harmful effects of the uncontrolled power.
An unstable flash of light discharged from the staff, you must succeed a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">saving throw</LSTag> or become blinded.
The staff is damaged, the flame is unpredictable. Success a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">saving throw</LSTag> or become burned for [1].

You are overwhelmed by the unstable power of the Flame of Anor. Roll a <LSTag Tooltip="Constitution">Constitution</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">saving throw</LSTag> or take [1] and become <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">prone</LSTag>.
Target still recieves half of the damage, but is not knocked back or <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">proned</LSTag>
Target is still blinded for 1 turn
Target is still blinded for 2 turns
This spell has -1 to it's DC
This spell has +1 to it's DC
This spell has +2 to it's DC
Adds +[1] to Ingelligence and +[2] to Wisdom (Up to [3])
Adds +[1] to Ingelligence and +[2] to Wisdom (Up to [3])
Adds +[1] to Ingelligence and +[2] to Wisdom (Up to [3])

Channels the ancient and profound insights of the wizards. As one’s connection to this power deepens, it enhances their presence and understanding, reflecting the legendary wisdom and influence of ancient wizards.
<LSTag Type="Image" Info="SoftWarning"/> The wielder must be a wizard in order for this bonus to be applied.
